kept.text: @MiriVinni They mostly just engage in irresponsible spending and various forms of internet attention seeking. Chad can't compete with Tiktok and Klarna

Affirm 🆚 Klarna 

Two BNPL giants. Same category. Very different scale.

Here’s the FY2025 snapshot:

🇺🇸 @Affirm 

• GMV: $36.7B (+38% YoY)
• Loan book: $7.03B
• Active customers: 23M (+23%)
• Merchants: 377K (+24%)
• Revenue: $3.22B
• Revenue growth: +39%
• Net profit: $52.2M
• Net profit growth: +110%

🇸🇪 @Klarna 

• GMV: $128B (+32% YoY)
• Loan book: $10.46B
• Active customers: 118M (+28%)
• Merchants: 966K (+42%)
• Revenue: $3.51B
• Revenue growth: +25%
• Net profit: $273M
• Net profit growth: -1400%

Takeaways:

Klarna wins on scale. Affirm wins on growth.

Same business model. Completely different stage.

📷 Source: Sanjeev Kumar - @WhiteSight_

kept.text:
Split payments don’t make it cheaper… they make it easier to ignore 💗
You stop asking “can I afford it?” and start asking “can I afford it today?”
That’s how payments stack… and suddenly your income is already spent.
If you need to split it… question it.

 #financialfreedom #wealthmindset #moneymanagement
